subject: Here’s the plan, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
I can't tell you how important this is | Derek --

I know we’ve sent you a lot of email over the last week as we focused in on our mid-month goal. Thank you so much for bearing with us and for stepping up when it mattered the most -- we smashed our goal, and I can't tell you how important that is.

But we can't let up now.

Early voting is kicking off in a few key states over the next couple weeks, voter registration deadlines are coming up fast, and the first debate is in just 10 days -- **[if you want to make a difference in the outcome of this race, you have to chip in right now. And when you do, we’ll send you a free sticker as a thank you for your support.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY1MzQ4MzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNTkzNjQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I’m proud of the organization we’re building. We’re running a tight ground game and smart, efficient ad campaigns.

But Derek, Trump’s doing something right, too. His poll numbers are rising in crucial battlegrounds like Ohio and Florida, and as far as we can tell, his fundraising is staying on track.

So here’s what your donation will go to if you chip in today -- here's the plan to stop him:
* We'll get more organizers on the ground, going door to door to make Hillary’s case as an increasing number of states begin to vote.
* We'll push new, major ad buys to get Hillary’s message on TV ahead of the first debate.
* We'll deploy additional staff in key counties and cities in which a concerted effort to register new voters can make a difference in this election.

**Make sure we have the funds to ring every bell, produce every ad, and put more boots on the ground. Right here, right now -- you can make a difference:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY1MzQ4MzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNTkzNjQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
I know the strength of this team, I know you know we have a real fight on our hands here -- and I know you’ll step up.

Let’s go,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and help us reach our goal of 2.5 million individual grassroots donors by the end of the month:**
| [

subject: Sorry to email on a Friday night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504a3/7be36b49/1e81aaea/78f866ac/1844900397/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")

Friend,

I'm sorry to email you on a Friday night, but my team tells me we're still about $3,000 short of our critical mid-month goal.

If we don't hit this goal, we may not have the resources to build a robust field team, reach out to voters all over Indiana, and spread our campaign's message of common-sense governing.

That's why I'm writing to you myself to ask -- **[will you pitch in $5 before tonight's mid-month deadline?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504a3/7be36b49/1e81aaea/78f866b3/1844900397/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-mmsept?refcode=20160916.2nd&amount=10")**

This close to the election, our campaign has to hit every one of its goals, or risk falling behind. Tonight's goal is no exception.

So if you're ready for a Senate that works again, and a senator who'll put Indiana first, **[please pitch in $5 today.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504a3/7be36b49/1e81aaea/78f866b3/1844900397/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-mmsept?refcode=20160916.2nd&amount=10")**

Best,

Evan

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Asking one final time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We need your help before midnight.

Dear Friend,

I want to give a big thank you to the friends and supporters working hard to make sure we hit our Rapid Response Fund target of $15,000.

There are only a few hours left before midnight, and I know we can meet our ambitious goal with your help.

Can I make a special request -- my last time asking before midnight: If you haven't contributed yet, can you take a moment and do so now?

CONTRIBUTE: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTUzMzE0MAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTAwMTM4Mjc0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0

I know I probably sound like a broken record, but we can't afford to be caught short when my opponent and the Republican machine launch their attack ads in the next few weeks.

Friend, if you believe in the progress we've made as a state and want to see it continue, it's important you donate now. Washington can't afford to go backward.

Very truly yours,

Jay Inslee

**My Democratic opponent, Congressman Patrick Murphy, has trouble with the truth.**

No wonder Hillary Clinton endorsed him. They are two peas in a liberal pod.

But here's the reality. Despite his failure to tell the truth and complete lack of experience or leadership, he could win this election because of his access to millions of liberal dollars that could drown out my campaign and voice.

name: Marco Rubio (Personal Account)
subject: Please read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016
body:
This wasn't easy to sit down and write to you...
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37624172:sRmmyKbNG:m:1:1328517760:6D69B6681CEA2AE24CE99F44AFE2AA7B:r)
---
Friend,

This email is difficult to write. In fact, I have never written an email like this before.

I really hope you will take just a minute to read it.

**Today I'm going to ask you to make a personal commitment. And I hope and pray I can count on you.**

You see, if you are like me, you are probably very tired of this long campaign season - and the divisiveness and negativity this year has carried seems like it has reached an astounding all-time high.

But I'm sure you'll also agree with me that the stakes are so high in this election - for the future of our country - that we have to do everything we can to secure a Republican majority in the Senate and elect leaders who -- no matter the outcome of the presidential race -- will reverse Barack Obama's agenda.

**[BUT it all starts with your help today -- only with your IMMEDIATE action today can we ensure the United States Senate remains in Republican control.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37624172:sRmmyKbNG:m:1:1328517760:6D69B6681CEA2AE24CE99F44AFE2AA7B:r)**

That's why I made the decision -- a personal commitment to you and my fellow conservatives -- to run for re-election.

But before I ask you for your commitment in return, I'm going to lay out my own, very personal commitment to you.

First, my commitment to you:

1. **I will campaign as hard as I can until the very last vote is counted.** Every day I will wake up and fight for you and America to ensure liberal Democrats don't control the U.S. Senate.
2. **I will fight to reverse every destructive item of the Obama Agenda.** Barack Obama's presidency has been a disaster for America - and with your help I will reverse every last destructive policy.
3. **I will make the necessary sacrifices to win this race and defeat my liberal opponent, Patrick Murphy - a die-hard Obama apologist and Clinton supporter.** I know you and your family make sacrifices every day and I am committed to making the necessary sacrifices to win this race and serve our nation in the US Senate.
4. **My word is my bond, and I will keep every commitment I make to you.** We all know politicians who say one thing and do another. I will always tell you the truth and you can count on me to follow through with my commitments to you.

I hope you accept this, my promise and commitment to you.

**But in return, I am asking you to make a commitment to me.**

Friend, will you commit to helping me defeat my Democrat opponent, keep Republican control of the Senate, and ultimately ensure that I am able to fight for us AND reverse Barack Obama's disastrous policies?

| [** I'M COMMITTED >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37624172:sRmmyKbNG:m:1:1328517760:6D69B6681CEA2AE24CE99F44AFE2AA7B:r)
---

**I need your commitment to win this race. I truly can't do it without you.**

Can I count on your commitment?

Because Friend, my campaign is facing critical fundraising challenges and frankly, I don't have anywhere else to turn. So, that's why I'm turning to you, and that's why your commitment in return is so important.

[** I'M COMMITTED >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37624172:sRmmyKbNG:m:1:1328517760:6D69B6681CEA2AE24CE99F44AFE2AA7B:r)

I want to personally thank you for reading my email and I'm hopeful you will make the necessary commitment to my campaign.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37624172:sRmmyKbNG:m:1:1328517760:6D69B6681CEA2AE24CE99F44AFE2AA7B:r) **

Marco Rubio

P.S. This election is not going to be easy, but our future is worth fighting for. I'm facing a tough campaign against Barack & Hillary's handpicked Democratic candidate. They are viewing his success as an extension of their own and are going to be working around the clock to see him win and me defeated. **[I need your help to fight back.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37624172:sRmmyKbNG:m:1:1328517760:6D69B6681CEA2AE24CE99F44AFE2AA7B:r)**

body:
| It happens all the time, Derek. Trump does something despicable, says something racist, or promises to do something hateful and my inbox fills up with emails from friends and family (and sometimes friends of friends of friends) asking the same question: How can I help stop this guy?

If you're wondering how to get involved (or if you're the one hearing that question), we now have the definitive guide to volunteer opportunities at Hillary for America. [**Just answer six questions and we will match you with things you can do right now to make a difference in this election based on your personality.**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjY1MzQ4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNTk0OTk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Everyone here at headquarters has gotten pretty into discovering what volunteer personality type they have. Here are some people you might recognize:

Robby - Our fearless leader is a Doer. When you start your career in the field, it should be no surprise here that Robby is at ease knocking on doors and talking to voters about why he loves Hillary Clinton.

Marlon - Our Director of States and Political Engagement is a Charmer. Marlon knows how to motivate a team and he likes a challenge. He can convince even the most staunchly undecided voter that Hillary is the only choice in this election.

Christina - Our Deputy Communications Director is a Maker. Christina’s talent is making sure people can connect Hillary’s message to what’s happening at their kitchen table.

Dennis - Last but certainly not least, Dennis is a Guide. As the National Finance Director, he’s a natural leader which is critical when trying to recruit new volunteers to get out there and make calls or knock on doors.

**What personality type are you, Derek? Take this short quiz and get your personalized volunteer to-dos right now. We’re getting down to the wire. We need you:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjY1MzQ4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNTk0OTk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Jess

Jessica Morales Rocketto
Digital Organizing Director
Hillary for America

[Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjY1MzQ4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNTk0OTk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)! subject: Your input needed: debating Hillary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
With the debate coming up FAST, I'll need your input IMMEDIATELY. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaMO8BABW4bBE~OoaFJBwDRMN6aaaaKSDmBL2-4Eua?n=9@uCw8u7&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=Y&4=&k=72808zFWlUhml3wkliFbuaFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm)

Friend,
In 9 days, I get the honor of fighting for you in the first presidential debate against Crooked Hillary Clinton.

To prepare for the BIGGEST night of our campaign, I'm turning to the very people who have humbled me and gotten me to where I am today... YOU.

As your champion, I need to know what you want me to fight for on that stage. I want you to be confident that I defend the issues you care about. I want to make you proud, Friend.

**[Which is why I'm asking you to take the TRUMP Debate Preparation Survey now. >>](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaMO8BABW4bBE~OoaFJBwDRMN6aaaaKSDmBL2-4Eua?n=9@uCw8u7&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=X&4=&k=72808zFWlUhml3wkliFbuaFcmVFmFmFam3l&mFm) **

I asked my campaign manager, Kellyanne, to commission this survey to our strongest supporters -- the people who will be the reason we WIN this debate against Hillary Clinton.

Friend, this debate isn't even about me. I'm only going on stage to be your voice. This debate is a fight between the American people and the political machine that Crooked Hillary represents.

We get the chance to compare -- side-by-side -- our vision of a freer, safer, and more prosperous America with Hillary's promise to bring four more years of Obama's failures.

name: Russ Feingold
subject: Back in the hands of the people
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Nobody benefitted more from Citizens United than the Koch brothers, Governor Scott Walker and Senator Ron Johnson. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4532/1c469400/afd308/3579e3f/755257650/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-160917?utm_source=ema_2016-09-17_guardian_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-17_guardian_nd&utm_campaign=guardian&utm_medium=ema") "Corporations. Go heavy after them to give. Take Koch's money. Get on a plane to Vegas and sit down with Sheldon Adelson. Ask for $1m now."
_\- The Guardian, September 14_ Friend, Nobody benefitted more from _Citizens United_ than the Koch brothers and two Wisconsin Republicans: Governor Scott Walker and Senator Ron Johnson. This week, a story published in _The Guardian_ showed just how deep the corruption goes. The story cites multiple instances of pay-for-play governing, straight from Scott Walker's desk. Billionaires and corporations cut checks to dark money groups supporting Republicans, then Governor Walker turned around and pushed for legislation that'd make life easier for these billionaires and their businesses. After the Supreme Court's lawless _Citizens United_ decision, the Koch brothers set their sights on Wisconsin. The tea party wave in 2010 helped them scoop up the governor's mansion, their "model legislator" in Ron Johnson, and a state legislature ready to do their bidding. Through the offices of Scott Walker and Ron Johnson, they've attacked the rights of just about everyone in Wisconsin: public sector employees, women, students, people of color, and many more. _They've even attacked the right to vote._ **The Kochs chose Wisconsin as their battleground for a reason: We have a long history of progressivism, clean elections, and clean government. They knew that if they could buy politicians here, they could do it anywhere.** Since 2010, the Koch brothers have spent over $44 million in Wisconsin to buy elections for Republicans who'd rig the political system in their favor. Governor Walker and my opponent, Senator Johnson, have repeatedly shown that they'll always side with their billionaire backers over the Wisconsinites they were elected to serve. But come November, that's going to change. If we work together, we can win this election -- and that's just the beginning. We're going to take our democracy out of the hands of corporations, multimillionaires, and special interest groups and put it where it belongs: Back in the hands of the people. Thank you, as always, for standing with me. Sincerely, Russ Feingold | [CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4532/1c469400/afd308/3579e3f/755257650/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-160917?utm_source=ema_2016-09-17_guardian_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-17_guardian_nd&utm_campaign=guardian&utm_medium=ema")

name: Team Bayh
subject: protecting Hoosier jobs (add your name)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504a2/7be36b49/1e8ff268/78f8651f/371548629/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend -- Evan is proud to have voted in 2008 to rescue the nation's automakers, a move that ended up saving 100,000 Hoosier jobs according to the Center For Automotive Research.

But Congressman Todd Young still thinks Evan voted the wrong way. In fact, he's said repeatedly that the rescue, a bipartisan strategy supported by both Evan and former Senator Dick Lugar, was a "waste" and that Congress should have let the auto industry go "belly up."

**[Add your name to tell Congressman Young that Hoosiers can't afford his "belly up" philosophy.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504a2/7be36b49/1e8ff268/78f8651e/371548629/VEsE/ "https://bayh.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/tell-todd-young-that-hoosiers-can-t-afford-his-belly-up-philosophy-")**

It's just one more example of Congressman Young's embrace of partisan ideology and special interests at the cost of Indiana livelihoods.

**Hoosiers deserve a senator who puts their jobs first, and Congressman Young has made clear over and over that he 'll sell Indiana out at the drop of a hat.**

It's no wonder Indiana's United Auto Workers endorsed Evan, saying that "He has not only in the past proved he will support working Americans and Hoosiers specifically, but he will continue to do so."

**[Tell Congressman Young that Hoosier jobs and livelihoods must come first.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504a2/7be36b49/1e8ff268/78f8651e/371548629/VEsF/ "https://bayh.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/tell-todd-young-that-hoosiers-can-t-afford-his-belly-up-philosophy-")**

| Friend --

[Jim Justice said that about my husband recently in front of a crowd of Hillary and Justice supporters. ](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3Dyh0CyVPhHiY%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=8_days_out&n=1)

The media barely even batted an eye at this despicable threat. A threat against my husband, the father of my children, and a man who has worked tirelessly to make West Virginia a better place. My daughters are scared that someone might actually try it.

The media loves Hillary and Justice - but you and I know that this state and this country need real leaders like Donald Trump and Bill Cole.

[We have only 8 days to meet our end of quarter goals.](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=8_days_out&n=2)

Just 8 days to prove that we can defeat the Justice-Hillary ticket and corrupt machine that has brought West Virginia into the dire state that it's in.

West Virginia can - and will - move forward without Jim Justice and his ally Hillary Clinton. There's no better person to lead our state out of this mess than my husband, Bill Cole.

[Help us reach our goal by making a donation through our secure website today.](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=8_days_out&n=3) Every dollar helps and Lord knows times are tough right now \- but with Bill Cole as Governor, the future is bright for West Virginia.

Sincerely,
Brownie Cole

This shift in polling has played out during just the first half of September -- in only two weeks.

Thank you,

Robby
